name: mcp-multi-model
description: Query DeepSeek, Gemini, Kimi, OpenAI, Grok, Qwen, GLM and more from Claude in parallel — compare answers and leverage each model's strengths.
long_description:
## Multi-Model MCP

An MCP server that lets Claude query multiple AI models in parallel and compare their answers side by side. Pre-configured for 9 mainstream providers out of the box — enable any subset by supplying only the API keys you have.

### Supported providers

- **DeepSeek** — code, math, logic, low cost
- **Google Gemini** — long context, Google Search grounding
- **Moonshot Kimi** — Chinese web search, real-time info
- **OpenAI** — GPT-4o / GPT-5 family, mature ecosystem
- **OpenRouter** — 300+ models through one endpoint
- **Perplexity** — Sonar models with built-in web search & citations
- **xAI Grok** — real-time X feed, reasoning
- **Qwen (Alibaba DashScope)** — strong Chinese, stable domestic access
- **GLM (Zhipu AI)** — agentic tool use, long text

Need more? Add **any OpenAI-compatible endpoint** (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, Mistral, Groq, etc.) by editing `config.yaml` after install — no code changes needed.

### Highlights

- **Parallel queries** — ask one question, get answers from all configured models
- **Unified `ask_ai` tool** — one entry point with per-call `temperature` / `top_p` control
- **Streaming output** — real-time SSE streaming
- **Conversation history** — multi-turn context via `conversation_id`
- **Image generation** — Gemini Nano Banana via `generate_image`
- **Video generation** — Gemini Veo via `generate_video`
- **Web search** — Kimi web search, Gemini Google Search grounding, Perplexity citations
- **Cost tracking** — per-call token usage and cost estimation
- **Auto-retry & fallback** — exponential backoff + fallback to backup model
- **Health check** — ping all models, report status/latency
- **Daily budget limit** — configurable spending cap
- **Local models** — Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp via OpenAI-compatible adapter

### Getting started

Provide at least one API key below. Any provider whose key you leave empty will be automatically skipped at startup. You can always add more models later by editing `config.yaml` inside the extension directory.

deepseek_api_key.title: DeepSeek API Key
deepseek_api_key.description: Code, math, logic. Very low cost. Get yours at https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys

gemini_api_key.title: Google Gemini API Key
gemini_api_key.description: Long context, Google Search grounding. Also required for image / video generation. Get yours at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

kimi_api_key.title: Moonshot Kimi API Key
kimi_api_key.description: Chinese web search and real-time info. Get yours at https://platform.moonshot.cn/console/api-keys

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key
openai_api_key.description: GPT-4o / GPT-5 family. Default model: gpt-4o-mini. Get yours at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

openrouter_api_key.title: OpenRouter API Key
openrouter_api_key.description: Access 300+ models through one endpoint. Edit config.yaml to switch between them. Get yours at https://openrouter.ai/keys

perplexity_api_key.title: Perplexity API Key
perplexity_api_key.description: Sonar models with built-in web search and citations. Get yours at https://www.perplexity.ai/settings/api

xai_api_key.title: xAI Grok API Key
xai_api_key.description: Real-time X/Twitter info, reasoning. Get yours at https://console.x.ai/

dashscope_api_key.title: Qwen (Alibaba DashScope) API Key
dashscope_api_key.description: Alibaba's Qwen models via DashScope. Strong Chinese, stable domestic access. Get yours at https://dashscope.console.aliyun.com/apiKey

zhipuai_api_key.title: GLM (Zhipu AI) API Key
zhipuai_api_key.description: Zhipu AI's GLM models. Agentic tool use, long text. Get yours at https://open.bigmodel.cn/usercenter/proj-mgmt/apikeys
